## Testing

<!-- What was tested? How can a reviewer verify this works? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the [coding standards](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] All new/changed code has tests
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Coverage meets or exceeds 85% minimum (`pnpm test:coverage`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Type check passes (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or internal URLs in code or comments
- [ ] No `any` types or `!` non-null assertions
- [ ] Public APIs have JSDoc with `@example` blocks
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if user-facing change)
- [ ] New dependencies justified in PR description (if applicable)
